title: Managing Tenants
description: Learn how to view tenant details, manage tenant settings, and navigate tenant-specific pages.

popover.title: Tenant Management
popover.description: This page shows all your managed tenants. Let's walk through the key features.

popover.title: Breadcrumb Navigation
popover.description: Use the breadcrumb trail to see where you are and quickly navigate back to parent pages.

popover.title: Tenant List
popover.description: Here you'll find all your managed tenants. Click on any row to see detailed information about that tenant.

popover.title: That's it!
popover.description: You now know how to manage your tenants. Check out other tutorials for more advanced features.
